title: Document and manually verify Tickflow worktree mode
description: Update Tickflow documentation for --worktrees, path namespace, sandbox modes, tk wrapper behavior, runtime resources, merge policy, cleanup/preserve semantics, and manual verification steps.
acceptance_criteria: README documents --worktrees, --sandbox, runtime resource config, .tick protection guarantees/limitations, merge conflict behavior, and manual tests for direct .tick write prevention and merge guard.
closed_reason: Expanded Tickflow worktree documentation and manual verification steps for --worktrees dry-run, path namespace, tk wrapper, readonly .tick protection, merge guard, conflict behavior, runtime resource provisioning, limitations, and expected outcomes.
